what_it_does: Lists six source files in the claude-ds project under /home/tim/company/design/claude-ds as the contents of interpretive wave-002 allocation batch-035.
observations: All entries share the same project value 'claude-ds' and the same root path
The listed paths include one top-level stylesheet and five files under system/
The file is a batch allocation manifest with no embedded code symbols
Entries use a uniform object shape: project, path, root
standouts: Entire batch is scoped to the claude-ds design-system project
Mix of CSS, HTML, and JS assets in a single batch
notes: A wave-002 batch manifest that registers six claude-ds design-system files for interpretive processing.
purpose_vs_actual: The file behaves as an allocation manifest listing file paths; there is no separate stated purpose, so purpose and actual behavior align as a ledger batch entry.
intention_signals: Catalog a specific slice of the claude-ds project so it can be interpreted as part of wave-002 batch-035.
contribution: Supplies a neutral, enumerated set of claude-ds files included in this batch, giving downstream fusion a concrete inventory of which design-system assets are being referenced.
summary_for_embedding: A JSON batch allocation manifest enumerating six claude-ds design-system files including styles.css and five system/ HTML/JS files.
intention_for_embedding: To register a selected set of claude-ds files for interpretive analysis in wave-002 batch-035.
